description_long: This is a weathered, four-door sedan with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of late 20th-century Eastern European cars. The exterior is predominantly white but heavily stained and dirtied, suggesting prolonged exposure to urban grime and the elements. The windows are tinted blue-green and appear foggy or dirty, further emphasizing the car's aged condition. The sedan features black trim along the lower body, black side mirrors, and simple, round black wheels. The rear of the car shows a faded taillight assembly and a missing or damaged badge, while the front has rectangular headlights and a plain grille. The overall appearance is functional and robust, with no visible luxury features or modern styling cues.
description: A dirty, aged white four-door sedan with black trim, foggy blue-green windows, and simple black wheels, showing signs of heavy urban use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing faded taillights, a dirty trunk, and no visible license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, black trim, and round black wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying rectangular headlights, a plain grille, and a heavily dirtied hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door handles and black wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: Simple round black wheels with a solid center and no visible spokes or decorative features.
